---
include-in-header: "_includes/fontawesome-2up.html"
knitr:
  opts_chunk: 
    collapse: true
execute: 
  echo: false
---

# [I'd love to hear from you!]{.primary}

You can find on the following social networks:

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(distilltools)
```

`r icon_link(
  icon = "mastodon",
  text = "Mastodon",
  url = "https://fosstodon.org/@belisards",
  rel = "me noopener"
)`
`r icon_link(
  icon = "github",
  text = "GitHub",
  url = "https://github.com/belisards"
)`
`r icon_link(
  icon = "linkedin",
  text = "LinkedIn",
  url = "https://www.linkedin.com/in/ellakaye"
)`

Or, you can drop me an e-mail at [adrianobf @ gmail.com]{.heading-font}
